mapper.sql: id, rule_name, description, priority, match_tool_pattern, match_keywords, match_service_type, match_arg_path, targets_json, enabled, version_no, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_routing_rules (rule_name, description, priority, match_tool_pattern, match_keywords, match_service_type, match_arg_path, targets_json, enabled) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{description}, #{priority}, #{matchToolPattern}, #{matchKeywords}, #{matchServiceType}, #{matchArgPath}, #{targetsJson}, #{enabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_routing_rules SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, description = #{description}, priority = #{priority}, match_tool_pattern = #{matchToolPattern}, match_keywords = #{matchKeywords}, match_service_type = #{matchServiceType}, match_arg_path = #{matchArgPath}, targets_json = #{targetsJson}, enabled = #{enabled}, version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version_no = #{versionNo} AND deleted = b'0'
UPDATE mcp_routing_rules SET deleted = b'1' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mcp_routing_rules WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_routing_rules WHERE enabled = b'1' AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY priority DESC
